raw_consumer_statement: Date of purchase on Macy 's website : XXXX, XXXX 2024 Amount of dispute : {$1000.00} I purchase skin care from Macy 's website using Macy 's benefit card ( only use on Macy 's ). I didn't receive my skin care, and I called Macy 's request for resend my stuff, but they rejected my request. So I called Macy 's card tried to dispute the charge. After 1 billing cycle they closed my dispute.
